task.title: Redis Cache Setup
task.description: Deploy Redis operator and Valkey instance for caching and rate limiting

implementation.details:
1. Install Redis operator
2. Create Valkey instance with persistence
3. Configure memory limits and eviction policies
4. Set up monitoring and alerts
5. Create service for internal access

decision.description: Redis eviction policy for rate limiting data

task.acceptance_criteria: Valkey instance is running, accepts redis-cli connections, can set/get keys, persistence is working
